_**User (2026-04-22 15:56:55Z)**_

ok - we are looking good on routing - let start working on layout of the scene.  imagine that we are moving from a cockpit view looking out the viewport to a view where we are actually going to be doing some scanning.  the intent is that the player will be able to move their mouse over a set of sample blocks to do the scanning.  The scan will take up to 10 seconds to complete.  create a component using the cube.ts as an example called asteroid and add 5 of them to the cold-boot-scan scene.  add and update unit tests as needed

---

_**Agent (copilot/auto)**_

I’m implementing this by adding a new reusable `asteroid` component modeled after `cube`, wiring 5 asteroids into `cold-boot-scan` with hover-to-scan interaction and a 10s completion timer, then updating/adding unit tests for the new component and scene scan behavior.
